docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANTOS, NORMA C/O LAW OFFICES OF K. J. PETSAS, PC AS TO DEFENDANT VOLMAN, ILAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $85.00 SERVED SEP-27-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOLMAN, ILAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY SANTOS, NORMA C/O LAW OFFICES OF K. J. PETSAS, PC VOLMAN, ILAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOS, NORMA C/O LAW OFFICES OF K. J. PETSAS, PC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLMAN, ILAN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VOLMAN, ILAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
